summary: Ukrainian forces reported multiple UAV and strike‑group movements across Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Sumy and Kharkiv regions, while Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs and conducted drone attacks on civilian targets in Donetsk, Odessa, Belgorod and Kharkiv fronts. Significant ground engagements included the capture of Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border and ongoing skirmishes in Sumy and Zaporozhye areas. Both sides continue intensive aerial and artillery activity, with civilian casualties reported.
key_points: Ukrainian strike UAV groups operating from Dnipropetrovsk moved toward Vasylkivka, Malooleksandrivka and Pryvovchanske; Zaporizhzhia groups headed to Malokaterynivka (Source: @eRadarrua/94020).
Ukrainian UAV squadron in Sumy region conducted missions toward Nedryhailiv, Romny and Lypova Dolyna (Source: @kpszsu/63071).
Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight, with air alerts reported in multiple regions and attacks on a civilian bus near Donetsk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian drone struck a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka village, Belgorod region, killing a man and a woman (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian units of the 11th Separate Motor Rifle Brigade captured Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Strike UAVs reported in Kharkiv region near Bohodukhiv and in Sumy near Krolevets, indicating active reconnaissance and targeting (Source: @kpszsu/63029; @kpszsu/63031).
KAB rocket units deployed on northern Kharkiv and Dnipropetrovsk, suggesting intensified artillery strikes (Source: @kpszsu/63035).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian strike UAV groups are active across Dnipropetrovsk, Zaporizhzhia, Sumy and Kharkiv, while Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs and conducted drone attacks on civilian targets, including a bus near Donetsk and a car in Belgorod. Ground combat saw the capture of Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border and ongoing skirmishes in Sumy and Zaporozhye. Both sides sustain high‑intensity aerial and artillery operations, resulting in civilian casualties.

points: Ukrainian strike UAV groups ("Ударний Бп") operating from Dnipropetrovsk moved toward Vasylkivka, Malooleksandrivka and Pryvovchanske, indicating coordinated offensive reconnaissance (Source: @eRadarrua/94020).
A UAV squadron in Sumy region headed toward the towns of Nedryhailiv, Romny and Lypova Dolyna, suggesting focus on eastern supply routes (Source: @kpszsu/63071).
UAV activity from Dnipropetrovsk toward Pavlohrad was reported, highlighting pressure on central‑eastern logistics corridors (Source: @kpszsu/63037).
Strike UAVs operating near Bohodukhiv in Kharkiv region and near Krolevets in Sumy indicate Ukrainian attempts to interdict Russian movements (Source: @kpszsu/63029; @kpszsu/63031).
KAB rocket units deployed on northern Kharkiv and Dnipropetrovsk suggest intensified artillery support for ground operations (Source: @kpszsu/63035).
Ukrainian forces of the 11th Separate Motor Rifle Brigade captured Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border, expanding the front line (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian units advanced up to 1,200 m in sections on the Volchansk sector, engaging in skirmishes around Karaychon and Okhrymovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs during the night, triggering air alerts across multiple Ukrainian regions (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
A Russian drone attacked a civilian bus near Donetsk, causing casualties (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Drone strike on a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka village, Belgorod region, killed a man and a woman (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Another drone hit a car on the Nizhnee Berezovo‑Vtoroe road, injuring a man (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Two fighters of the "Orlan" unit were injured while on duty in the Valuyky district, indicating Russian personnel losses (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian artillery and air strikes continued in the Zaporozhye region, with over 30 attacks on civilian objects in 24 hours, injuring nine people (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
In the Kherson region, Russian attacks killed two civilians in Gornostayevka and injured 14 elsewhere (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian UAVs reported in Sumy region near Shostka district, with the "North" Guards Motor Rifle Division repelling a counter‑attack (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian forces advanced up to 1,000 m in twenty‑two sections in the Sumy region, with ongoing skirmishes in Ivolzhansk, Kondratovka, Pisarevka and surrounding areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Enemy activity noted near Kondratovka in the Krasnopolsky district, with both sides exchanging fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Skirmishes continued between Lesnoye and Taratutino in the Valuyky district, reflecting persistent eastern front clashes (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian UAV group operating from Sumy toward Nedryhailiv, Romny and Lypova Dolyna adds pressure on eastern supply lines (Source: @kpszsu/63071).
KAB rocket units deployed on northern Kharkiv indicate heightened artillery activity in the north (Source: @kpszsu/63035).
UAV activity reported in Dnipropetrovsk heading toward Pavlohrad, a key northern logistics hub (Source: @kpszsu/63037).
Strike UAVs near Bohodukhiv in Kharkiv region suggest reconnaissance of northern approaches (Source: @kpszsu/63029).
Russian tactical aviation activity noted on the eastern direction, potentially affecting northern sectors (Source: @kpszsu/63061).
Ukrainian forces advanced up to 1,200 m in sections on the Volchansk sector, engaging near Karaychon and Okhrymovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian UAV attacks targeted Odessa, causing civilian casualties and infrastructure damage (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Drone strikes in the Zaporozhye region resulted in over 30 attacks on civilian objects, injuring nine people (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
UAV activity south of Mykolaiv heading north‑east indicates monitoring of southern maritime approaches (Source: @kpszsu/63063).
Russian artillery and air strikes continued in the Kherson region, killing two civilians in Gornostayevka and injuring 14 elsewhere (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian forces reported progress in Vozdvizhevka settlement in Zaporozhye, displaying flags after successful action (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight, prompting widespread air alerts (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian air defense systems operated over Crimea and other regions, engaging incoming UAVs (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Drone attacks on civilian vehicles in Belgorod region (Novaya Tavolzhanka) resulted in fatalities (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487).
Ukrainian UAV groups conducted reconnaissance missions in Sumy, Dnipropetrovsk, Kharkiv and Mykolaiv areas (Source: @kpszsu/63071; @kpszsu/63037; @kpszsu/63063).
Russian tactical aviation activity reported on the eastern direction, indicating possible strike missions (Source: @kpszsu/63061).

key_developments: Ukrainian strike UAV groups moved from Dnipropetrovsk toward Vasylkivka, Malooleksandrivka and Pryvovchanske, indicating coordinated offensive operations. (Source: @eRadarrua/94020)
Russian forces launched up to 150 UAVs overnight, triggering air alerts across multiple Ukrainian regions. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487)
Ukrainian units of the 11th Separate Motor Rifle Brigade captured Grano village on the Kharkiv‑Belgorod border, expanding the front line. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487)
A Russian drone struck a civilian bus near Donetsk, causing casualties among passengers. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487)
Drone attack on a passenger car in Novaya Tavolzhanka, Belgorod region, killed a man and a woman. (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/30487)
KAB rocket units were deployed on northern Kharkiv and Dnipropetrovsk, suggesting intensified artillery strikes. (Source: @kpszsu/63035)
Ukrainian UAV squadron operated in Sumy toward Nedryhailiv, Romny and Lypova Dolyna, targeting eastern supply routes. (Source: @kpszsu/63071)
sections.threat_assessment: Russian aerial activity, highlighted by a massive UAV sortie, poses a significant threat to Ukrainian air defenses and civilian infrastructure across the east and south. Ukrainian UAV and KAB deployments indicate a proactive effort to contest Russian reconnaissance and artillery fire, especially on the northern and eastern fronts. Continued civilian casualties from drone strikes underscore the need for enhanced protective measures around population centers.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian command is concentrating UAV reconnaissance and strike assets in Dnipropetrovsk, Sumy and Kharkiv to disrupt Russian logistics and support ground advances, such as the capture of Grano village. Russian forces are leveraging large‑scale UAV attacks and targeted drone strikes to pressure civilian morale and stretch Ukrainian air defense resources. Both sides are intensifying artillery and rocket deployments, reflecting a deepening of the conflict in contested front‑line zones.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of UAV flight paths reveals a pattern of Ukrainian operations targeting supply hubs in the east, while Russian UAV swarms aim to overwhelm air defenses. The deployment of KAB rocket systems on northern Kharkiv suggests preparation for larger artillery barrages. Civilian casualty reports from drone attacks should be cross‑referenced with satellite imagery to assess damage to infrastructure and adjust protective postures.
